global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a prominent logo and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to stream content with a flexible subscription.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: A prominent logo at the top, featuring the text 'StarVault' in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The headline text 'Stream the hype' is displayed in a large, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Body text description
elements.description: The body text 'Cancel anytime' is smaller and positioned below the headline.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bold button at the bottom with the text 'Start now' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Several circular and rectangular shapes in lighter shades of green, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element that adds to the decorative aspect of the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular element, similar to the previous one.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A third small circular element, completing the trio of decorative shapes.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: The main body text 'Stream the hype Cancel anytime' is centrally positioned and bold.

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: The headline 'StarVault' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: The text 'Start now' is positioned at the bottom, encouraging user action.
